summary: Completed comprehensive testing of e-commerce platform with real observability via InfluxDB and Grafana. Backend APIs fully functional, real metrics collection working, dashboard accessible with admin login.

minor_issues.impact: Users get logged out after short period
minor_issues.details: JWT tokens may have short expiration time causing frequent re-login requirements
User session expires quickly requiring frequent re-authentication

passed_tests: Real metrics endpoint (/api/metrics/real) returns actual data
Traffic generation updates real metrics successfully
Dashboard loads with Real Metrics tab active
Dashboard can switch between Real and Simulated modes
